arts.ttl: David de Gea shows where his loyalties lie with four-word Man Utd admission
arts.sum: Manchester United and Arsenal met on Wednesday night almost seven years to the day that David de Gea turned in a record-breaking performance in a 3-1 win against the Gunners at the Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: Exclusive: David Sullivan holds talks with West Ham's board over Julen Lopetegui's future as majority decision made
arts.sum: David Sullivan not yet ready to axe Julen Lopetegui 😮

arts.ttl: DAZN secures exclusive Fifa Club World Cup rights
arts.sum: Streaming platform DAZN secures exclusive rights to broadcast next summer's Fifa Club World Cup.

arts.ttl: David Ornstein Reveals Liverpool Contract Offer to Anfield Superstar
arts.sum: Liverpool have three major stars out of contract at the end of the season and reports have suggested that one has finally been offered a new deal

arts.ttl: David Ornstein Shares Julen Lopetegui Sack Update out of West Ham
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui has seen West Ham fans turn on him after poor results and he is closer to the sack than ever in east London.

arts.ttl: Manchester United show interest in RB Leipzig’s David Raum
arts.sum: Manchester United are interested in RB Leipzig and Germany international David Raum, according to Florian Plettenburg. Under new head coach Ruben Amorim, Manchester United will be taking a close look…

arts.ttl: Martin Boyle set Hibs challenge by David Gray as boss tells him what he needs to do to force way back in
arts.sum: The Easter Road favourite has struggled for form this season and been used from the bench in the past three games
